channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Batch SVG to Vector Converter - Thu May 21 15:45:35 UTC 2026
item.description:
A powerful Android Studio plugin to convert multiple SVG files into Android VectorDrawable format (.xml) in one click. Features: Batch conversion of multiple SVG...
vendor: Pankajgaur811 downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.pankajgaur811.multiple_svg_to_vector_drawable

item.title: Stock Ticker - Thu May 21 02:10:16 UTC 2026
item.description:
Shows configurable stock quotes in the IntelliJ IDEA status bar. 在 IntelliJ IDEA 状态栏滚动展示股票代码、名称、最新价、涨跌金额和涨跌幅，并支持配置名称显示、涨跌颜色和滚动间隔。.
vendor: snfdf downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.stockticker.plugin

item.title: Trace - Local Dev Activity Recorder - Thu May 21 08:03:59 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Zhouxu downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.trace.plugin
